title: More Common nametags
body:
> This data pack is now discontinued. > This means that it will no longer receive any more updates. A problem with Minecraft has something to do with name tags. They are worthless, but too rare. It's not fair! You've been exploring for so many mineshafts only to end up with 10-12 name tags, and you want to use it on 20 animals! And if they die, they won't drop it back!

This data pack fixes this problem. With this data pack, most structures which normally don't have any name tags will now have one, and structures which already had them will have more.

If you play with this data pack for about 50 in-game days, you should end up with about 30 name tags. That is if you explore enough.

* To make master librarian villagers sell name tags for a cheaper price, use this data pack instead.

Other download link (Planet Minecraft)
